title: Go project including pkg/specgen fails to compile
body:
### Issue Description

Building a Go project that imports `github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/specgen` fails with podman v5.8.1 when the dependency graph resolves `github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec v1.3.0.`

The failure appears to come from an API mismatch in pkg/specgen/resources_linux.go. In runtime-spec v1.3.0, is *int64, but Podman assigns an int64 directly.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Create a Go module that imports github.com/containers/podman/v5/pkg/specgen

Ensure the dependency graph resolves:

github.com/containers/podman/v5 v5.8.1
github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec v1.3.0

### Describe the results you received

`go build main.go ` results:

../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/podman/v5@v5.8.1/pkg/specgen/resources_linux.go:17:13: cannot use limit (variable of type int64) as *int64 value in struct literal

### Describe the results you expected

The project should compile successfully

### podman info output

```yaml
version:
  APIVersion: 5.8.1
  BuildOrigin: Fedora Project
  Built: 1773187200
  BuiltTime: Wed Mar 11 01:00:00 2026
  GitCommit: c6077f645788743258a1a749f8005b4fb3cbe533
  GoVersion: go1.25.7 X:nodwarf5
  Os: linux
  OsArch: linux/amd64
  Version: 5.8.1
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
